$comment: generated by the ocm schema generation tool
title: GetS3Resource
description:
GetS3Resource is a transformer specification to download a resource's content from S3 and buffer
it to a file, so a following step (e.g. AddLocalResource) can store it. The download is dispatched
by the resource's S3 access.
Spec: GetS3ResourceSpec - the resource to download and an optional output path.
Output: GetS3ResourceOutput - the downloaded file and the resource descriptor.

ocm.software.open-component-model.bindin.title: Type

ocm.software.open-component-model.bindin.title: GetS3ResourceOutput
ocm.software.open-component-model.bindin.description: GetS3ResourceOutput is the output specification of the GetS3Resource transformation.

file.description: File is the file access specification for the downloaded content.

ocm.software.open-component-model.bindin.$comment: generated by the ocm schema generation tool
ocm.software.open-component-model.bindin.title: GetS3ResourceSpec
ocm.software.open-component-model.bindin.description: GetS3ResourceSpec is the input specification for the GetS3Resource transformation.

outputPath.description: OutputPath is where the content is buffered. If empty, a temporary file is used.

resource.description: Resource is the resource descriptor whose S3 access is downloaded.
